untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of ticker pronounceability (phonetic simplicity score, vowel-leading preference) and company name pronounceability relative to peer group. These are linguistic/semantic attributes not available in standard OHLCV-based technical indicators. IPO date tracking and peer group comparability metrics are also not in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using momentum proxy (price > 5-day MA for entry continuation, price < 5-day MA for exit momentum loss) and return threshold for profit target (0.75% = 0.0075). However, the core signal depends on cognitive/linguistic factors (pronounceability, fluency, familiarity) that cannot be operationalized from price/volume data alone. A complete implementation would require external data feeds for IPO dates, linguistic analysis APIs, and peer group databases.
